logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

set-payload.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json
var data = [payload.serviceDescription] ++ [payload.problemDesc] ++ payload.appNotes.SummaryNotes --- write(data, 'text/json')]
set-payload.doc:name: Embedding Request

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/java var req = if (payload.Request != null) payload.Request else payload --- { serviceCallId: req.Service_Call_ID default req.service_call_id, serviceDescription: req.Service_Description default "", problemDesc: req.ProblemDesc default "", custnmbr: req.CUSTNMBR default "", adrscode: req.ADRSCODE default "", divisions: req.Divisions default "",
summaryNotes: (req.app_notes default []) filter ($.SummaryNotes != null and $.SummaryNotes != "\u0000" and $.SummaryNotes != "") map $.SummaryNotes joinBy " ",
existingDescs: (req.order_materials default []) filter ($.ITEMDESC != null) map lower(trim($.ITEMDESC)),
appNotes: req.app_notes default [], orderMaterials: req.order_materials default [] }

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output application/json var req = if (payload.Request != null) payload.Request else payload --- { serviceCallId: req.Service_Call_ID default req.service_call_id, serviceDescription: req.Service_Description default "", problemDesc: req.ProblemDesc default "", custnmbr: req.CUSTNMBR default "", adrscode: req.ADRSCODE default "", divisions: req.Divisions default "",
summaryNotes: (req.app_notes default []) filter ($.SummaryNotes != null and $.SummaryNotes != "\u0000" and $.SummaryNotes != "") map $.SummaryNotes joinBy " ",
existingDescs: (req.order_materials default []) filter ($.ITEMDESC != null) map lower(trim($.ITEMDESC)),
appNotes: req.app_notes default [], orderMaterials: req.order_materials default [] }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var om = vars.refinedPayload.orderMaterials default [] --- (om filter ((item, index) -> item.ITEMDESC != null and trim(item.ITEMDESC) != "")) map ((item2, index) -> upper(trim(item2.ITEMDESC)))

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json var latencyMs = (now() as Number {unit: 'milliseconds'}) - vars.timestamp var ranked = vars.recommendations default [] var maxScore = if (sizeOf(ranked) > 0) ranked[0].final_score else 1.0 var MIN_SCORE = 0.10
var suggested = ranked map ((rec) -> { sim: if (maxScore > 0) (rec.final_score / maxScore) else 0, rec: rec }) filter ((item) -> item.sim >= MIN_SCORE) map ((item) -> { similarity_score: round(item.sim * 10000) / 10000, material_details: { ITEMNMBR: item.rec.itemnmbr, ITEMDESC: item.rec.itemdesc, CATEGORY: item.rec.item_category, REASONS: (item.rec.reasons default [])[0] } }) --- { Service_Call_ID: vars.refinedPayload.serviceCallId, search_metadata: { query_vector_source: vars.refinedPayload.serviceDescription, total_suggestions_found: sizeOf(suggested), search_latency_ms: latencyMs as Number, similar_calls_used: sizeOf(vars.similarCallIds default []), candidates_from_similar_calls: sizeOf(vars.materials default []), universal_items_injected: sizeOf(vars.universalMaterials default []) }, suggested_materials: suggested }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: "POST", host: Mule::p('sys.db.api.host'), basePath: Mule::p('sys.db.api.basepath'), path: Mule::p('sys.db.api.path'), responseTimeout: "600000", }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map ((item, index) -> item.service_call_id)

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

ee:transform.doc:name: Build Materials From Similar Calls Query

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: "POST", host: Mule::p('sys.db.api.host'), basePath: Mule::p('sys.db.api.basepath'), path: Mule::p('sys.db.api.path'), responseTimeout: "600000", }
%dw 2.0 output application/java var excluded = vars.itemDescriptions default [] --- payload filter ((item) -> !(excluded contains upper(trim(item.itemdesc default ""))) )

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

choice.doc:name: Skip if No Materials or No Embedding

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: "POST", host: Mule::p('sys.db.api.host'), basePath: Mule::p('sys.db.api.basepath'), path: Mule::p('sys.db.api.path'), responseTimeout: "600000", }

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: "POST", host: Mule::p('sys.db.api.host'), basePath: Mule::p('sys.db.api.basepath'), path: Mule::p('sys.db.api.path'), responseTimeout: "600000", }
%dw 2.0 output application/java var raw = payload[0].max_usage default 1 --- if (raw == null or raw == 0) 1 else raw as Number

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { method: "POST", host: Mule::p('sys.db.api.host'), basePath: Mule::p('sys.db.api.basepath'), path: Mule::p('sys.db.api.path'), responseTimeout: "600000", }

%dw 2.0 output application/java var excluded = vars.itemDescriptions default [] var existingIds = (vars.materials default []) map $.material_id --- payload filter ((u) -> !(excluded contains upper(trim(u.itemdesc default ""))) and !(existingIds contains u.material_id) )

%dw 2.0 output application/java var excluded = vars.itemDescriptions default [] var existingIds = (vars.materials default []) map $.material_id var maxUsage = vars.maxUsage default 1
var newUniversals = payload filter ((u) -> !(excluded contains upper(trim(u.itemdesc default ""))) and !(existingIds contains u.material_id) ) map ((u) -> u ++ { hit_count : 0, freq_score : 0.0, vector_sim : 0.0, // Give universals a meaningful base score via pop_score + partial freq weight // so they appear but don't crowd out items with real freq signal injected : true }) --- (vars.materials default []) ++ newUniversals

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "Start of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "correlationId": vars.correlationId, "appName": app.name, "flow": flow.name, "message": "End of flow " ++ flow.name, "timestamp": now(), }]
